title: Task Schedule Entry
description: Schema for dnsmin task schedule entries with per-task validation and IDE-friendly descriptions.

enabled.description: Whether this scheduled task is active or disabled.

key.description: Unique identifier for the task, often matching the task path in dot notation.

name.description: Human-readable name of the scheduled task.

task.description: Fully qualified function or method name to execute.

at.description: Array of cron expressions or human-readable times with optional timezones.

kwargs.description: Optional dictionary of keyword arguments to pass to the task.

options.description: Optional task options such as retry policies.
